📊 5️⃣ 專利 Claim 模板（可直接用）


---

🧠 Claim 1（核心母專利）

A system comprising:

- an AI control tower configured to receive natural language commands,
- a multi-agent orchestration engine,
- a runtime execution layer,
- and a physical energy system interface,

wherein the system dynamically allocates AI agents to tasks including
wind energy optimization and disaster response.


---

🌬️ Claim 2（風力控制）

A method for optimizing wind turbine blade angles using AI prediction models,
based on real-time wind speed and turbulence data.


---

🌪️ Claim 3（防災）

A real-time disaster response system that automatically triggers
energy system shutdown based on seismic or typhoon thresholds.


---

------------------------------------------------
| Disaster AI | Wind AI | UAV AI | Edge AI |
------------------------------------------------
                     ↓
          5G / IoT / SCADA / Cloud

---

🌐 0️⃣ 發明總標題（母專利）

Title:
Multi-Agent AI Factory Based Energy, Disaster, UAV and Edge Communication Control System

申請人:
Chih Li Hus

技術領域:
AI能源管理 / 災害預測 / 無人機系統 / 5G邊緣運算 / 智慧電網


---

🧠 1️⃣ 技術問題（Background of Invention）

現有技術存在：

❌ 風力發電無法即時應對極端氣候

❌ 防災系統與能源系統分離

❌ 無人機巡檢與能源控制不同步

❌ 5G/IoT資料無統一調度層

❌ AI模型無法直接控制物理設備



---

🚀 2️⃣ 發明核心解法（Summary of Invention）

本發明提出：

> 🧠 一種「AI 工廠控制塔系統」，可統一調度能源、防災、無人機與通訊系統



其包含：

AI Control Tower（MG-ER-RO-KC）

Multi-Agent Orchestrator

Disaster AI Module

Wind Energy AI Module

UAV Inspection Module

Edge 5G Communication Layer



---

⚖️ 6️⃣ 核心 Claim（交件級）


---

🧠 Claim 1（母專利）

A system comprising:

an AI control tower configured to receive natural language commands,
a multi-agent orchestration engine,
a runtime execution layer,
and interfaces to physical energy and disaster systems,

wherein the system dynamically assigns AI agents to manage
wind energy optimization, disaster response, and UAV operations.


---

🌪️ Claim 2（防災）

A method for automatically controlling energy infrastructure
based on real-time disaster detection including typhoons and earthquakes,
wherein the system triggers protective shutdowns or mode switching.


---

🌬️ Claim 3（風能）

A method for optimizing wind turbine performance using
AI-based prediction of wind speed and turbulence,
and dynamically adjusting blade pitch angles.


---

🚁 Claim 4（無人機）

A system for autonomous UAV inspection of wind energy infrastructure,
wherein UAVs capture images, perform AI analysis, and report structural faults.


---

📡 Claim 5（通訊）

A low-latency communication system using 5G and edge computing
for real-time control of distributed energy systems and UAV networks.


---

🧠 7️⃣ 技術效果（審查關鍵）

本發明提供：

✔ 即時能源調度能力

✔ 災害自動保護機制

✔ AI 驅動物理系統控制

✔ 分散式無人機巡檢

✔ 低延遲邊緣控制架構
